---
title: "AMSTROM — Myoton Individual Pipeline"
output: html_document
params:
  RUN_ID: "487LePa_20251003"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(arrow)
library(tidyr)
```

```{r controls}
RUN_ID              <- params$RUN_ID
SHOW_QC_PLOTS       <- TRUE
EXPORT_PARQUETS     <- TRUE

# Checkpoint order — fixed by protocol sequence (main.ipynb SEQ_ORDER)
# INIT WU REST0 MVC_REF REST1 SVC_REF REST2 EX_DYN REST3 MVC_RECOV_DYN REST4 EX_STA REST5 MVC_RECOV_STA END
# Myoton is measured at rest only: after_wu, before_dyn, after_dyn (x2), before_sta, after_sta (x2)
CHECKPOINT_LEVELS <- c("after_wu", "before_dyn", "after_dyn_1", "after_dyn_2", "before_sta", "after_sta_1", "after_sta_2")

# Relative deviation baseline:
# before_dyn = immediately before EX_DYN (after reference tests) — primary pre-exercise state
# before_sta = immediately before EX_STA — secondary baseline for EX_STA context
RELDEV_BASELINE <- "before_dyn"

# Colours
col_myo       <- "#2a9d8f"   # teal — Myoton primary

# Paths
export_root <- here::here("results", "DATA_EXPORT", RUN_ID)
myoton_parquet_path        <- file.path(export_root, "preprocessed_myoton.parquet")
checkpoint_table_path      <- file.path(export_root, "myoton_checkpoint_feature_table.parquet")
```

```{r theme}
# House plot theme: half-open frame, horizontal gridlines only, outward ticks.
theme_amstrom_hgrid <- theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    axis.line.y        = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y       = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(colour = "grey92", linewidth = 0.4),
    axis.ticks.length.x.bottom = unit(3.5, "pt"),
    axis.ticks.length.y.left   = unit(3.5, "pt")
  )
```

---

## `r RUN_ID` — Myoton checkpoint analysis

---

```{r load_data}
# Load the preprocessed Myoton table for this run.
stopifnot(file.exists(myoton_parquet_path))
myoton_raw <- arrow::read_parquet(myoton_parquet_path)

myo_metrics  <- c("myo_Frequency", "myo_Stiffness", "myo_Decrement", "myo_Relaxation", "myo_Creep")
participant_id <- sub("_[0-9]{8}$", "", RUN_ID)  # RUN_ID minus the trailing _YYYYMMDD
```

```{r split_rows}
# Keep only the measurement rows (drop any header/metadata rows).
myoton_tests <- myoton_raw |> dplyr::filter(.data$row_type == "test")
```

```{r assign_checkpoints}
# REST3 and REST5 each contain 2 Myoton tests (distinct myo_test_id values within the SEQ).
# Rank by myo_test_id within each SEQ to assign _1 and _2 suffixes.
myoton_tests <- myoton_tests |>
  dplyr::group_by(.data$SEQ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    test_rank = rank(.data$myo_test_id, ties.method = "first"),  # order the 2 tests within REST3/REST5
    checkpoint = dplyr::case_when(
      .data$SEQ == "REST0" ~ "after_wu",
      .data$SEQ == "REST2" ~ "before_dyn",
      .data$SEQ == "REST4" ~ "before_sta",
      .data$SEQ == "REST3" ~ paste0("after_dyn_", .data$test_rank),
      .data$SEQ == "REST5" ~ paste0("after_sta_", .data$test_rank),
      TRUE ~ paste0(.data$SEQ, "_", .data$test_rank)
    )
  ) |>
  dplyr::ungroup() |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    checkpoint = factor(.data$checkpoint, levels = CHECKPOINT_LEVELS),
    checkpoint_order = as.integer(.data$checkpoint)
  )

n_checkpoints <- dplyr::n_distinct(myoton_tests$checkpoint)
cat(sprintf("[%s] %d checkpoints found: %s\n",
    RUN_ID, n_checkpoints,
    paste(sort(unique(as.character(myoton_tests$checkpoint))), collapse = ", ")))
```

```{r compute_reldev}
# Compute reldev_pct relative to RELDEV_BASELINE (REST2 = pre-EX_DYN state).
# REST0 is post-WU, pre-MVC_REF — reported as-is, not used as normalization anchor.
baseline_row <- myoton_tests |>
  dplyr::filter(.data$checkpoint == RELDEV_BASELINE) |>
  dplyr::summarise(dplyr::across(dplyr::all_of(myo_metrics), mean, na.rm = TRUE))

if (nrow(baseline_row) == 0) {
  warning(sprintf("[%s] Baseline checkpoint '%s' not found — reldev will be NA.", RUN_ID, RELDEV_BASELINE))
  myoton_tests <- myoton_tests |>
    dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(
      dplyr::all_of(myo_metrics),
      ~ NA_real_,
      .names = "reldev_{.col}"
    ))
} else {
  for (m in myo_metrics) {
    ref_val <- baseline_row[[m]]
    reldev_col <- paste0("reldev_", m)
    myoton_tests[[reldev_col]] <- (myoton_tests[[m]] - ref_val) / ref_val * 100  # % change from before_dyn baseline
  }
}
```

```{r build_checkpoint_feature_table}
# Assemble the per-checkpoint export table. participant_id is handled in two steps -- the
# select() reserves nothing for it, then we drop any stray copy and re-add it cleanly -- so
# the final column order comes out fixed regardless of what was already on myoton_tests.
reldev_cols <- paste0("reldev_", myo_metrics)

myoton_checkpoint_feature_table <- myoton_tests |>
  dplyr::select(
    RUN_ID          = "run_id",
    participant_id  = dplyr::all_of(character(0)),  # added below
    checkpoint,
    checkpoint_order,
    SEQ,
    myo_test_id,
    sequence_valid,
    dplyr::all_of(myo_metrics),
    dplyr::all_of(reldev_cols)
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    RUN_ID         = RUN_ID,
    participant_id = participant_id,
    reldev_baseline = RELDEV_BASELINE
  ) |>
  dplyr::arrange(.data$checkpoint_order)

# Drop intermediate column if present
myoton_checkpoint_feature_table <- myoton_checkpoint_feature_table |>
  dplyr::select(-dplyr::any_of("participant_id")) |>
  dplyr::mutate(participant_id = !!participant_id) |>
  dplyr::select(RUN_ID, participant_id, checkpoint, checkpoint_order, SEQ,
                myo_test_id, sequence_valid, reldev_baseline,
                dplyr::all_of(myo_metrics), dplyr::all_of(reldev_cols))
```


---

## Checkpoint overview

```{r checkpoint_table_display}
# Display table: per-checkpoint test means + RelDev for the key metrics.
myoton_checkpoint_feature_table |>
  dplyr::select(checkpoint, sequence_valid,
                myo_Stiffness, myo_Frequency, myo_Decrement, myo_Relaxation, myo_Creep,
                reldev_myo_Stiffness, reldev_myo_Frequency) |>
  dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(dplyr::where(is.numeric), ~round(., 2))) |>
  knitr::kable(
    col.names = c("Checkpoint", "Valid", "Stiffness (N/m)", "Frequency (Hz)",
                  "Decrement", "Relaxation (ms)", "Creep",
                  "Stiffness reldev (%)", "Frequency reldev (%)"),
    caption = paste0("Myoton test-mean values per checkpoint. reldev = % change from ", RELDEV_BASELINE, ".")
  )
```

---

## Checkpoint trajectory plots

```{r checkpoint_trajectory_plot, fig.width=10, fig.height=8}
# QC plot: each metric across checkpoints, point shape marks valid vs invalid tests.
if (SHOW_QC_PLOTS) {
  metric_labels <- c(
    myo_Stiffness  = "Stiffness (N/m)",
    myo_Frequency  = "Frequency (Hz)",
    myo_Decrement  = "Decrement (D)",
    myo_Relaxation = "Relaxation (ms)",
    myo_Creep      = "Creep"
  )

  plot_df <- myoton_checkpoint_feature_table |>
    dplyr::select(checkpoint, checkpoint_order, sequence_valid, dplyr::all_of(myo_metrics)) |>
    tidyr::pivot_longer(dplyr::all_of(myo_metrics), names_to = "metric", values_to = "value") |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      metric = factor(.data$metric, levels = names(metric_labels),
                      labels = unname(metric_labels))
    )

  ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = .data$checkpoint, y = .data$value, group = 1)) +
    geom_line(colour = col_myo, linewidth = 0.8) +
    geom_point(
      aes(shape = factor(.data$sequence_valid)),
      colour = col_myo, size = 3
    ) +
    scale_shape_manual(values = c("0" = 4, "1" = 19),
                       labels = c("0" = "invalid", "1" = "valid"),
                       name = "sequence_valid") +
    facet_wrap(~ metric, scales = "free_y", ncol = 2) +
    labs(
      title = paste0(RUN_ID, " - Myoton checkpoint trajectory"),
      subtitle = paste0("Vertical line = ", RELDEV_BASELINE, " (reldev baseline)"),
      x = "Checkpoint", y = NULL
    ) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = RELDEV_BASELINE, linetype = "dashed",
               colour = "grey60", linewidth = 0.4) +
    theme_amstrom_hgrid +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 35, hjust = 1))
}
```

## Relative deviation from `r RELDEV_BASELINE`

```{r reldev_plot, fig.width=10, fig.height=6}
# QC plot: RelDev (% from before_dyn) per metric across checkpoints.
if (SHOW_QC_PLOTS) {
  reldev_plot_df <- myoton_checkpoint_feature_table |>
    dplyr::select(checkpoint, checkpoint_order,
                  dplyr::all_of(reldev_cols)) |>
    tidyr::pivot_longer(dplyr::all_of(reldev_cols),
                        names_to = "metric", values_to = "reldev_pct") |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      metric = sub("^reldev_myo_", "", .data$metric),
      metric = factor(.data$metric,
                      levels = c("Stiffness", "Frequency", "Decrement", "Relaxation", "Creep"))
    )

  ggplot(reldev_plot_df, aes(x = .data$checkpoint, y = .data$reldev_pct, group = 1)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", colour = "grey72", linewidth = 0.4) +
    geom_line(colour = col_myo, linewidth = 0.8) +
    geom_point(colour = col_myo, size = 2.5, shape = 19) +
    facet_wrap(~ metric, scales = "free_y", ncol = 3) +
    scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) paste0(round(x), "%")) +
    labs(
      title = paste0(RUN_ID, " - Myoton reldev from ", RELDEV_BASELINE),
      x = "Checkpoint", y = paste0("% change from ", RELDEV_BASELINE)
    ) +
    theme_amstrom_hgrid +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 35, hjust = 1))
}
```


---

## Export

```{r export}
# Write the per-checkpoint feature table back next to the run's other exports.
if (EXPORT_PARQUETS) {
  arrow::write_parquet(myoton_checkpoint_feature_table, checkpoint_table_path)
  cat(sprintf("[%s] Exported:\n  %s\n", RUN_ID, checkpoint_table_path))
}
```
